summary: Mobile-friendly web-based payment entry app for office staff. Features dynamic form with NEFT/Cheque payment modes, local storage persistence, and Excel export. Lightweight, minimal design optimized for low-end Android phones.
architectural_notes: Frontend-only app using HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Mobile-first responsive design for low-end Android devices
Lightweight Excel export using JS library (e.g., SheetJS)
Conditional field rendering based on payment mode selection
Clean white + light grey minimal UI theme
No animations or heavy assets for performance

existing_features.title: Create a payment entry form with Customer Invoice Number (required text field) and Payment Mode dropdown (required, options: NEFT, Cheque)

When Payment Mode is set to NEFT, dynamically show Transaction ID/UTR Number (required text field), Amount (required number field), and Date of Payment (required date picker). Hide all Cheque-specific fields.

When Payment Mode is set to Cheque, dynamically show Bank Name (required text field), Cheque Number (required text field), Cheque Amount (required number field), and Cheque Date (required date picker). Hide all NEFT-specific fields.
On Submit button click, save the payment entry to the backend and automatically clear all form fields to their default state

Create a Report section that displays all saved payment records in a table with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date

Add a Download Excel button in the Report section that exports all payment records to an Excel file with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date

Implement mobile-first responsive layout with clean white and light grey theme, large input fields optimized for touch, minimal UI with no animations, and lightweight design for fast loading on low-end Android phones
Fix the payment records table to correctly display NEFT Date and Cheque Date columns. Ensure date values from the backend are properly formatted and rendered in the table.
Add a Clear Records button in the payment records page that deletes all saved payment records from the backend when clicked.
Reduce the size and simplify the styling of the Clear Records button and Download Excel button in the PaymentReportTable component to make them smaller and more compact
Change the Invoice Number field in the payment entry form to accept both text and numeric input (type="text" instead of restricted number format)
Add the ability to select multiple payment modes (NEFT and/or Cheque) for a single invoice number in the payment entry form, showing all relevant fields for selected modes simultaneously
Add the ability to enter multiple invoice numbers for a single payment transaction, allowing one payment (NEFT or Cheque) to be applied across multiple bills

new_feature_requests.summary: Dynamic payment form with Invoice Number and Payment Mode dropdown (NEFT/Cheque)
Conditional fields for NEFT mode (Transaction ID, Amount, Date)
Conditional fields for Cheque mode (Bank Name, Cheque Number, Amount, Date)
Form submission saves to local storage and auto-clears form
Report section displaying all saved payment records in a table
Excel export functionality with all payment columns

Store all payment entry data in the backend with fields: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID (NEFT only), NEFT Amount (NEFT only), NEFT Date (NEFT only), Bank Name (Cheque only), Cheque Number (Cheque only), Cheque Amount (Cheque only), Cheque Date (Cheque only)
Fix date display in payment records table
Add Clear Records button in payment records page
Make Clear Records and Download buttons simpler and smaller
Allow Invoice Number field to accept both text and numeric formats
Add multiple payment modes for a single invoice
Add single payment option for multiple invoices/bills
